description: Chiggi Patches v1.14.3 — CrazyGames interstitial fix: mid-game interstitial ads also drove a loading overlay that waited on the interstitial 'Showed'+'Dismissed' lifecycle events (named interstitialAdShowed/interstitialAdDismissed, unlike the rewarded onRewarded* events), so the overlay hung. Remove ads now fires those events for showInterstitial too, so the overlay dismisses and the game resumes with no video. CrazyGames patches: Bypass Play license check (required; defeats the PairIP 'get it on Google Play' redirect), Remove ads (no video for interstitial/rewarded; lifecycle events fired so the loading overlay dismisses and rewarded ads still credit; banners hidden), Disable analytics (native Sentry telemetry), Remove AD_ID, Change app name -> 'CrazyGames Morphe' (package kept so Google/Facebook/Apple login still works). Note: in-page web video ads served remotely inside the WebView are not in the app bytecode and remain. Apps: SonyLIV (com.sonyliv 6.23.1), Nutrilio (net.nutrilio 1.20.2), Threads (com.instagram.barcelona 434.0.0.41.74), Arrow Puzzle (com.easybrain.arrow.puzzle.game 1.7.0), CrazyGames (com.crazygames.crazygamesapp 1.6.7).
